name: Western Light Broil with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef top round or boneless (sirloin steak, cut 1-inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy sauce, honey, lemon juice, chopped green onions, and garlic powder in a bowl.
2. Pour the marinade over the steak and turn to coat evenly.
3. Refrigerate for 6 to 8 hours, turning occasionally.
4. Discard the marinade.
5. Place the steak on a rack in a broiler pan with the meat surface 3 to 4 inches from the heat.
6. Broil for 16 to 20 minutes until medium-rare, turning once.
7. Keep the steak warm.
8. Arrange an equal amount of each vegetable (asparagus tips, carrots, and peas) on four dinner plates in a spoke fashion.
9. Slice the steak into 1/4-inch thick slices.
10. Place the slices over the vegetables.
11. Top with a tomato rose if desired.
12. Makes 4 servings.
